title: BASIC NEEDS SUPPLIES - 211info
text: BAMBINOS OREGON BASIC NEEDS SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides basic needs for babies and children, including diapers, wipes and formula. Services are limited to once every 30 days. 322 Main Street Suite 200 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Low-income families Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-noon, Wednesday 3pm-6pm, 1st and 3rd Saturday of the month 1pm-4pm Email (503) 623-4618 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-4618 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof that the dependant child resides at the same address as client applying (WIC, OHP card, TANF, etc.) AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Thursday 9am-noon, Wednesday 3pm-6pm, 1st and 3rd Saturday of the month 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in Main Street Plaza, lower level. Next door to Food Bank. Services: Diapers Formula/Baby Food Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING MATERIAL GOODS - NEW BABY GIFTS PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD SAFETY EQUIPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BAMBINOS OREGON
